formula: var d=parseFloat(inputs.drives)||0;var s=parseFloat(inputs.drive_size)||0;var r=inputs.raid||'5';var usable=r==='0'?d*s:r==='1'?s:r==='5'?(d-1)*s:r==='6'?(d-2)*s:r==='10'?(d/2)*s:0;var red=r==='0'?'None':r==='1'?'Mirror':r==='5'?'1 drive':r==='6'?'2 drives':r==='10'?'Mirror + Stripe':'Unknown';return{usable:usable.toFixed(0),redundancy:red};
